name: CLM_DAW_PROD_SLCTN_CD
title: Dispense as Written Selection Code.
description: Indicates the prescriber's instructions regarding generic substitution or how those instructions were followed

concept.display: Supplemental drugs (reported by plans that provide Enhanced Alternative coverage)
Substitution allowed – Patient requested that brand be dispensed
Substitution allowed – Pharmacist selected product dispensed
Substitution allowed - Generic not in stock
Substitution allowed – Brand drug dispensed as generic
Substitution not allowed – Brand drug mandated by law
Substitution allowed – Generic drug not available in marketplace
